sql_array: CREATE OR REPLACE WINDOW variance(val bigint) RETURNS double EXTERNAL NAME 'sql.var';
UPDATE my_table SET value = value + 50 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, variance(value) OVER (PARTITION BY id) FROM my_table;
CREATE OR REPLACE WINDOW cumulative_sum(val bigint) RETURNS bigint EXTERNAL NAME 'sql.cumsum';
